source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Determine the self-inductance of a toroidal solenoid with cross-sectional area \( A \) and mean radius \( r \), closely wound with \( N \) turns of wire on a nonmagnetic core. Assume that \( B \) is uniform across a cross section (that is, neglect the variation of \( B \) with distance from the toroid axis). Determine the self-inductance of a toroidal solenoid.

Assume that \( B \) is uniform across a cross section (that is, neglect the variation of \( B \) with distance from the toroid axis). Determine the self-inductance of a toroidal solenoid.
